original_query: best time of year to visit Patagonia for trekking
reformulated_query: best months to trek Patagonia weather conditions guide
expected_coverage_delta: +0.30 ranking (Reddit demoted from Rank 1), +0.05 coverage (ensures trekking-specific guides surface first)
rationale: Adding 'months', 'weather conditions', and 'guide' steers the retriever toward comprehensive guide-style pages (Swoop, Wilderness Travel, Aurora) and away from short forum threads that lack trekking-specific detail.

original_query: EU AI Act compliance requirements high-risk systems provider deployer obligations prohibited practices transparency 2026
reformulated_query: EU AI Act high-risk AI systems provider deployer obligations prohibited practices transparency requirements August 2026 compliance
expected_coverage_delta: +0.10 ranking (A&O Shearman promoted to rank 3), +0.05 freshness (sources with explicit 2026 dates boosted)
rationale: The reformulated query removes the redundant '2026' anchor (already captured by 'August 2026') and front-loads the most discriminative terms 'high-risk AI systems provider deployer obligations' to prioritize law-firm and regulatory analyses over vendor blogs, which should improve both ranking (pushing A&O Shearman above Snowflake/Hyperproof) and freshness (favoring sources with explicit August 2026 dates).

original_query: current university policies and honor code updates addressing generative AI use in higher education
reformulated_query: university generative AI policy honor code updates 2024 2025 academic integrity guidelines site:edu OR site:org -site:facebook.com
expected_coverage_delta: +0.20 ranking (eliminates contrastive fail from Facebook post intrusion), +0.10 fidelity (removes truncated source from aggregate), +0.05 temporal_currency (filters toward dated academic sources)
rationale: Adding explicit temporal anchors (2024 2025) and domain restrictions (-site:facebook.com) would exclude the truncated social media post from results while prioritizing .edu and .org domains that host official university policy documentation. The term 'guidelines' broadens retrieval of practical policy documents beyond just 'policies'.
